name: @ogulcancelik/pi-web-browse
description_en: Web search and content extraction skill for pi-coding-agent. Search the web and fetch pages via a real headless browser (CDP). Works on Linux, macOS, and Windows.
description_zh: pi-coding-agent 的网络搜索和内容提取技能。通过网络搜索并通过真实无头浏览器（CDP）获取页面。适用于 Linux、macOS 和 Windows
